description: A salad built from fresh vegetables such as tomato, cucumber, onion, and bell pepper, usually finished with olives, feta, olive oil, and oregano. It is refreshing and savory rather than leafy-heavy.
preparation_steps: Cut the vegetables into bite-sized pieces.
Dress with olive oil and optional vinegar.
Season with oregano, salt, and pepper, then serve fresh.

nutrition.fat: Moderate, mainly from olive oil and feta

health_advice.benefits: Rich in vegetables and includes unsaturated fat from olive oil.
health_advice.risks: Feta and olives can make the sodium content fairly high.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use plenty of vegetables and a moderate amount of cheese and salt.

dietary_notes.note: Usually vegetarian and gluten-free. Vegan versions replace or omit feta.
